case_title: PHILIP LYONS VS. PHILLIP C. HARRIS ET AL

docket_entries.description: SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, PHILIP SERVED APR-12-2016, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, PHILLIP C.
MINI MINUTES FOR JUN-21-2016 10:30 AM FOR DEPT 610

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-21-2016 CONTINUED TO SEP-20-2016 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
NOTICE OF SETTLEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, PHILIP
SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $400.00 AGAINST PHILIP LYONS FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: JUN-21-2016, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JUL-08-2016. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

COMMON COUNTS/OPEN BOOK ACCOUNT/COLLECTIONS, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF LYONS, PHILIP AS TO DEFENDANT HARRIS, PHILLIP C. DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-11-2016 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAR-07-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-18-2016

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUN-21-2016 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE MAY-11-2016 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITH PREJUDICE
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF SEP-20-2016 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
